intel.summary: A 3-sentence executive summary focused on the Indian SMB market opportunity.

strategic_advantage.title: Straight-forward billing software for small and medium businesses
strategic_advantage.descripiont: EZBiillify V2 Web is a smart, user-friendly billing solution designed to simplify the process of invoicing and payment for small and medium businesses. Our software offers a range of features that cater to the unique needs of these clients, including:

strategic_advantage.title: Flexible pricing options
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our billing software is designed with flexibility in mind. We offer a range of pricing plans to suit the needs of each client, from basic monthly plans for small businesses to more advanced annual plans for larger organizations.

strategic_advantage.title: Secure data storage and management
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software is designed with security in mind. We use industry-standard encryption to protect all client data, including billing information, payment details, and customer records. This ensures that your clients' sensitive information is kept safe at all times.

strategic_advantage.title: Automatic invoicing and payment reminders
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software automatically generates and sends invoices to clients on a regular basis. This ensures that clients receive timely billing information, reducing the risk of overdue payments and improving cash flow management.

strategic_advantage.title: User-friendly interface
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software is designed with ease of use in mind. We have made sure that our billing solution is intuitive and easy to navigate for clients of all skill levels.

strategic_advantage.title: Customizable reports and analytics
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software offers a range of customizable reports and analytics to help you track your client's billing activity. This includes detailed reports on invoices, payments, and payment history, as well as overdue invoice reminders and payment trends.

strategic_advantage.title: 24/7 customer support
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software is designed with 24/7 customer support. We offer a range of support options to help you get the most out of our billing solution, including live chat, email support, and phone support.

strategic_advantage.title: Scalable and flexible pricing plans
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software is designed with scalability in mind. We offer a range of pricing plans to suit the needs of each client, from basic monthly plans for small businesses to more advanced annual plans for larger organizations.

strategic_advantage.title: Mobile-friendly interface
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software is designed with mobile compatibility in mind. We offer a range of mobile-friendly interfaces that allow you to access your client's billing information from anywhere, at any time.

strategic_advantage.title: Integration with popular payment gateways
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software is designed with integration with popular payment gateways. This means that you can easily accept payments through our billing solution, reducing the need for clients to use multiple payment methods.

strategic_advantage.title: Customizable pricing plans
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software offers a range of customizable pricing plans to suit the needs of each client. This means that you can tailor your billing solution to meet the specific needs of your clients and increase revenue.

strategic_advantage.title: User-friendly documentation
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software offers comprehensive user-friendly documentation. We have made sure that our billing solution is easy to understand for clients of all skill levels. This includes detailed documentation on how to use the software, as well as troubleshooting guides and frequently asked questions.

strategic_advantage.title: Multi-lingual support
strategic_advantage.descripiont: Our software is designed with multilingual support. We offer support in multiple languages to help you communicate with clients from different countries or regions.

intel.summary: EZ-Diine Web: A SaaS platform for small kirana stores in Tier-2 India.
intel.description: EZDine is a restaurant billing, POS, order management, kitchen display, inventoire, and BI saaS platform designed to meet the needs of multi-tenant, multi-brach restaurants. The app is built on top of Flutter and TypeScript, and uses Next.js for frontend development. It supports offline-first and fast interactions, multi-tenancy, multi-branching, touch-friendly UX, and role-based security.

strategic_advantage.title: 5 Strategic Features
strategic_advantage.descripiont: 1. Customizable Storefront: Allows users to customize their store's interface and branding.

strategic_advantage.title: 2. E-commerce Integration: Integrates with popular e-commerce platforms such as Amazon and Flipkart.
strategic_advantage.descripiont: 3. POS System: Allows users to accept payments through their POS system.

strategic_advantage.title: 3. Customer Data Management: Provides users with access to customer data such as purchase history and preferences.
strategic_advantage.descripiont: 4. Analytics & Reporting: Allows users to track sales, customer behavior, and other key metrics.

strategic_advantage.title: 5. Mobile App: Provides users with an easy-to-use mobile app for managing their store's inventory, orders, and more.
strategic_advantage.descripiont: 5. Integration with Third-Party Tools: Allows users to integrate third-party tools such as loyalty programs, delivery services, and payment gateways.
